description: The system shall use ChatGPT to verify the applicant’s answers against model answers for screening questions and record the outcomes for every screening question

The system shall create an approach that uses cosine similarity and Jaccard similarity to compare the parsed CV and the required job vacancy to determine the degree of fit and provide a percentage rating of the applicant’s suitability
The system shall utilize the Spacy Python library to accurately extract relevant CV content using natural language processing

The system shall create an algorithm that takes the average of the CV ranking and the validation of the screening questions to determine the outcome and present the result as a total score that represents the applicant’s overall compatibility
The applicants shall be able to create an account and log in to the system with their personal information
The applicants shall be able to upload their CVs to be parsed and analyzed
The system shall allow applicants to edit their parsed CV data
The system shall provide a set of screening questions to the applicants
The system shall allow applicants to answer the screening questions
The system shall create a job vacancy according to the newly opened job vacancy
The system shall allow recruiters to create screening questions and model answers for these questions
The system shall allow recruiters to view the applicant’s final reports
